name: DarkStyleMedia
description: Professional photography and videography. Available for commercial, editorial, and creative projects.

about.bio: I'm a Creative professional, Photographer and Videographer with a passion for capturing authentic moments and crafting compelling visual stories. From intimate portraits to high-energy commercial shoots, every project is approached with the same obsessive attention to light, composition, and emotion.
about.bio2: Available for commercial campaigns, event coverage, portrait sessions, music videos, and creative collaborations. Based in Barnsley, Uk. I travel for projects Nationwide & Let's create something interesting.
